title: Keria (gamer)
description: South Korean League of Legends pro gamer
extract: Ryu Min-seok, better known as Keria, is a South Korean professional League of Legends player for T1. Throughout his career, he has won one League of Legends Champions Korea (LCK) title and three League of Legends World Championship titles. He also represented the South Korean national team at the 2022 Asian Games, earning a gold medal.
